D

DevSecurityConfig - Class in com.example.shortesttm_path.security
The Spring Security configuration class for the dev profile used in development.
DevSecurityConfig() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttm_path.security.DevSecurityConfig
The default constructor.

E

equals(Object) - Method in class com.example.shortesttm_path.data.ShortestPathBean
 

F

filterChain(HttpSecurity) - Method in class com.example.shortesttm_path.security.DevSecurityConfig
Disables Spring Security in dev.

G

getShortestPath(String, String) - Method in class com.example.shortesttm_path.controller.ShortestPathController
Returns the shortest metro path (the one with the least stations) between two STM metro stations.
getShortestPath(String, String) - Static method in class com.example.shortesttm_path.util.ShortestPathUtil
Returns the shortest metro path (the one with the least stations) between two STM metro stations.

H

handle() - Method in class com.example.shortesttm_path.controller.ShortestPathController
Returns a 400 bad request with an error message if the StationsOnSameLineException exception was thrown meaning that the two provided stations were on the same line.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.example.shortesttm_path.ShortesttmPathApplication
The main method of the Spring Boot application.

S

ShortestPathBean - Class in com.example.shortesttm_path.data
Represents the shortest metro path (the one with the least stations) between two STM metro stations.
ShortestPathBean() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttm_path.data.ShortestPathBean
The default constructor.
ShortestPathController - Class in com.example.shortesttm_path.controller
The controller related with providing the shortest metro path (the one with the least stations) between two STM metro stations.
ShortestPathController() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttm_path.controller.ShortestPathController
The default constructor.
ShortestPathUtil - Class in com.example.shortesttm_path.util
Util class to calculate the shortest metro path (the one with the least stations) between two STM metro stations.
ShortestPathUtil() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttm_path.util.ShortestPathUtil
The default constructor.
ShortesttmPathApplication - Class in com.example.shortesttm_path
The main class of the Spring Boot application.
ShortesttmPathApplication() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttm_path.ShortesttmPathApplication
The default constructor.
StationsOnSameLineException - Exception Class in com.example.shortesttm_path.exception
Is thrown when the two stations are on the same line.
StationsOnSameLineException() - Constructor for exception class com.example.shortesttm_path.exception.StationsOnSameLineException
Standard RuntimeException constructor with a custom message.
